targets.query:
from(bucket: "document_management")
  |> range(start: 2026-04-29T00:00:00Z, stop: 2026-05-29T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "document_access")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "session_duration_sec")
  |> group(columns: ["user_id"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "total_accesses"})

from(bucket: "document_management")
  |> range(start: 2026-04-29T00:00:00Z, stop: 2026-05-29T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "document_access")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.akcija == "pregled")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "session_duration_sec")
  |> group(columns: ["document_id"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "view_count"})
  |> sort(columns: ["view_count"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)

from(bucket: "document_management")
  |> range(start: 2026-04-29T00:00:00Z, stop: 2026-05-29T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "document_changes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "version_number")
  |> group(columns: ["akcija"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "broj_izmena"})
  |> sort(columns: ["broj_izmena"], desc: true)

from(bucket: "document_management")
  |> range(start: 2026-04-29T00:00:00Z, stop: 2026-05-29T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "document_changes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "version_number")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Broj izmena"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> yield(name: "dnevne_izmene")

from(bucket: "document_management")
  |> range(start: 2026-04-29T00:00:00Z, stop: 2026-05-29T23:59:59Z)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "document_access")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "session_duration_sec")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "Broj pristupa"}))
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: count, createEmpty: true)
  |> yield(name: "count")
